description:
All the tools and plugins you need to connect, stream and share your content.

NDI Tools contains all the tools and plugins needed to connect, stream and share your content. Contains Access Manager, Remote, Router, Test Patterns, Studio Monitor, Webcam Input, Screen Capture, Bridge and plugins for Audio Direct, VLC, Premiere Pro, After Effect.
Fixed
- Fixed an issue where the NDI Audio Direct VST3 plug-in settings could not be configured via dropdowns when used inside a DAW application.
- Fixed a possible memory leak in NDI Screen Capture HX where changing video codec settings would cause the existing send advertiser instance to be leaked.
- Fixed an issue in NDI Studio Monitor where the list of audio devices would not dynamically update when connecting or disconnecting audio devices on Windows.
- Fixed an issue where the receiver’s name would appear blank in the Discovery UI when the receiver had an input name configured.
- Fixed an issue in NDI Access Manager on macOS where the preferred NIC setting would revert to "AUTO" after closing and reopening the application.
- Fixed an issue in NDI Scan Converter on macOS where the cursor position would appear offset in the captured output.
- Fixed an intermittent crash when destroying send or recv advertiser objects.
- Added missing NDI receiver advertiser API symbols to the visionOS library.
- SpeedHQ Codec Improvements: Improved SpeedHQ rate control quality and consistency by refining quality level boundaries and adjusting bitrate tolerance thresholds
